task_completion.description: Verify the agent searches for the Bortezomib and Green tea interaction in the app
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app displaying an interaction query or result specifically for 'Bortezomib' and 'Green tea'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent searches for the Carfilzomib and Green tea interaction in the app
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app displaying an interaction query or result specifically for 'Carfilzomib' and 'Green tea'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent creates the required text report file
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor or terminal interface where the agent is creating or editing a file named '/sdcard/green_tea_safety_report.txt'.

task_completion.description: Verify the report documents the correct traffic light color for Bortezomib
task_completion.visual_evidence: The visible text inside the report file explicitly states the interaction color for Bortezomib + Green tea is Red or Orange.

task_completion.description: Verify the report documents the correct traffic light color for Carfilzomib
task_completion.visual_evidence: The visible text inside the report file explicitly states the interaction color for Carfilzomib + Green tea is Green, Yellow, or Grey.

task_completion.description: Verify the report contains the correct safety conclusion
task_completion.visual_evidence: The visible text inside the report file explicitly concludes that Carfilzomib is the safer treatment option for a green tea drinker.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used the Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen navigating the actual app's graphical user interface to find the drug interactions, rather than using a web browser, an external search engine, or hallucinating the answers.

integrity.description: Verify the reported colors match the app's output
integrity.visual_evidence: The traffic light colors written in the text report correspond to the actual colors displayed on the screen when the agent searched for the interactions in the app.

integrity.description: Verify the agent manually created the report rather than using a pre-existing shortcut
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen typing the report contents in a text editor or using standard echo/cat terminal commands, rather than executing a single pre-written script that bypasses the UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Bortezomib has a MAJOR/contraindicated interaction with Green Tea (expected app color: Red or Orange) because EGCG polyphenols block its boronic acid structure. Carfilzomib has no documented interaction with Green Tea (expected app color: Green, Yellow, or Grey) because it uses a different epoxyketone structure. Therefore, Carfilzomib is the safer drug. The final report must be saved exactly at /sdcard/green_tea_safety_report.txt.
